hero.title: Know what to grow. Know where to sell.
hero.subtitle: A decision tool for Indian farmers. Compare crops by expected yield and price, find the best mandi for your harvest, and make choices grounded in real data.
features.heading: Three ways to use the analyser
grow.title: Grow
grow.body: Discover which crops suit your region this season. See expected yields, price forecasts, and whether a crop has traditional roots in your area.
sell.title: Sell
sell.body: Compare mandis by distance and net price after transport. Find where your harvest fetches the best return, or confirm that local is the smart choice.
explore.title: Explore
explore.body: Dive into historical price trends, seasonal patterns, and regional data. Build your own understanding of the agricultural landscape.
about.heading: Built for honest decisions
about.p1: Crop Analyser brings government mandi prices, weather records, and decades of agricultural data into one place, so the choice in front of you is backed by evidence rather than a sales pitch. It gives you a clear picture, not a rosy one. When the model is uncertain, it says so. When the data is thin, it shows you. Your farm deserves straight talk.
about.p2: It starts from what already works on your land. A crop your district has grown for years is treated as the strong default, and the data is there to confirm or challenge it, not to push the latest trend. The same goes for selling: when pooling a harvest and trucking it to a distant market does not actually pay, the tool tells you to sell locally instead of inventing a premium that is not real.
about.draws.title: What it draws on
about.draws.body: Agmarknet and eNAM mandi prices, district crop-production history, seasonal weather from global climate records, and India Post location data. All public sources, with each number traceable to where it came from.
about.decides.title: How it decides
about.decides.body: A tradition-first engine weighs regional history, soil and climate fit, seasonal weather, and market prices together. Expected yield and price come from models trained on the real record (a yield model plus nearly 2,000 price forecasts across 15 states), never a guess dressed up as certainty.
lang.label: Language
season.label: Season
ws.smart.title: Smart mode on
ws.smart.affectsBody: recommendations use your soil and climate for a sharper match. Add soil details above.
ws.smart.noopBody: This tool doesn't use soil data, so results are the same as Simple mode.
loc.errNotFound: Couldn't find that PIN. Pick your district.
crop.label: Crop
goal.label: Goal
pg.advisor.title: Crop Advisor
pg.advisor.subtitle: Best crops for your field: regional history, market prices, and live seasonal weather. Switch to Smart mode and add soil details for a sharper agronomic match.
pg.advisor.simpleHint: Simple Mode · turn on Smart for soil suitability
pg.advisor.empty: Set your location above, then press Recommend crops.
pg.soil.title: Soil Match
pg.soil.subtitle: Pure soil/climate model: enter your soil values in the Soil details panel (Smart mode) above, then match the best crops.
pg.soil.needSmart: Turn on Smart mode (top-right) to enter soil details, then come back here.
pg.soil.matchDefaults: Match crops (using defaults, fill Soil details for accuracy)
pg.mandi.title: Mandi Comparison
pg.mandi.subtitle: Nearest markets for your crop, with net price after transport.
pg.mandi.pickCrop: Pick a crop above to see market prices.
pg.mandi.noLiveData: No live mandi data for this crop in your area, showing the state average instead.
pg.mandi.noData: No market or state price data for this crop.
pg.mandi.setLoc: Set a pincode or use GPS above to rank markets by distance.
pg.profit.title: Profit Planner
pg.profit.subtitle: Estimate profit, break-even price, and selling risk for your crop.
pg.fpo.title: FPO Bulk Selling
pg.fpo.subtitle: Pool members' harvest and see if trucking it together beats selling alone.
pg.fpo.invalidRows: Each farmer row needs latitude, longitude, and a positive quantity.
pg.fpo.ifSoldAlone: If each member sold on their own:
pg.map.title: Farm-to-Market Markup by State
pg.map.subtitle: Darker shading marks a wider gap between farm-gate and market price. Click a state for details.
pg.map.prompt: Click any state on the map to see its markup, farm-gate, and market price.
pg.crops.title: Crop Markup by State
pg.crops.subtitle: How far farm-gate prices sit below market prices, state by state. The highest markups (worst for farmers) are flagged.
pg.revenue.title: Estimated Revenue Loss to Farmers
pg.revenue.subtitle: About ₹{{total}} Cr in total annual loss across all states (proxy volume model).
pg.trend.title: Price Trend Over Time
pg.trend.subtitle: Farm-gate versus market price month by month for your selected crop and state.
pg.forecast.title: Price Forecast (LSTM)
pg.forecast.subtitle: Historical (last 12 months) plus 6-month LSTM prediction. The dashed line marks where the forecast begins. Only states and crops with a trained model are listed ({{count}} states).
